headline: PPG recognized as ‘Exceptional Workplace’ by Gallup for fourth consecutive year
summary: PITTSBURGH, March 04, 2026--PPG (NYSE: PPG) today announced that it has received its fourth consecutive Gallup Exceptional Workplace Award (GEWA). This award recognizes the most engaged workplace cultures in the world and highlights those that set the standard for building thriving, high‑performing organizations.

headline: PPG Teams Up With IPG and Whirlpool to Advance Laser Curing
summary: PPG teams up with IPG and Whirlpool to speed laser curing for powder coatings, cutting energy use, emissions and costs as pilot trials advance commercialization.
